name: Web Rhythm Game UI
description: Step 17 Final: Overhauled Adaptive Multiband Beat Detection with Spectral Flux (Onset Detection) to flawlessly capture acoustic and pop tracks, while maintaining Dynamic Moving Average thresholds for dense Metal mixes. Replaced naive average BPM detection with an Interval Histogram Mode clustering. Added Tulus - Andai Aku Bisa (Chrisye Cover).
